cPanel-Fix: One security-remediation.sh for CVE-2026-41940 (cPanel), CVE-2026-31431 (kernel "Copy Fail"), CSF, optional domain/proxy cleanup, and optional operator hardening.

cPanel-Fix: One security-remediation.sh for CVE-2026-41940 (cPanel), CVE-2026-31431 (kernel "Copy Fail"), CSF, optional domain/proxy cleanup, and optional operator hardening.
CVE-2026-31431-check: Read-only checker for CVE-2026-31431 (algif_aead local root). Reports kernel/module state and suggests mitigations.
